title: Route claim, pr, review, and sync commands through the coordination worktree
description: Make live coordination commands resolve, read, and write authoritative state through the mesh/state coordination worktree rather than branch-local files. mesh sync should also reconcile coordination state against git — detecting task branches merged outside of mesh merge and marking the corresponding work items, claims, and review packets as done/archived/merged.
acceptance_criteria: mesh claim writes live claim state through the coordination worktree
mesh pr and mesh review resolve review packets and runtime state from the coordination worktree
mesh sync can summarize live state from the shared root without checking out feature branches
mesh sync detects task branches that have been merged to main outside of mesh merge and reconciles coordination state: marks work items done, archives claims, and marks review packets merged
